name: AmSemnatSDK
summary: Read and PAdES-sign with Romanian CEI eID cards over NFC.
description:
Romania-first iOS SDK for reading MRZ + photo + eDATA and for producing
PAdES B-B signatures with Romanian Electronic Identity Cards (CEI) over
NFC. Public surface is locked in lockstep with the Android, Expo, and
Node verifier siblings — see https://github.com/am-semnat for the
umbrella repos.

Wraps a vendored fork of AndyQ/NFCPassportReader (MIT) with CAN-based
PACE support and a Romanian eDATA + signing applet driver. Consumers do
not interact with the underlying fork — the public API is
`AmSemnat.readIdentity(can:pin1:)`, `AmSemnat.sign(can:pin2:pdfHash:signingTime:)`,
and `AmSemnat.verifyPassiveOffline(rawSod:dataGroups:trustAnchors:)`.
